info.title: Craw Chat Management API
info.description: Authority snapshot for the operator-console management backend served behind /api/admin/*.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Operator console session bootstrap and current-session introspection.

tags.description: Campaign configuration and campaign state changes.

tags.description: Channel, provider, credential, model, and pricing catalog administration.

tags.name: billing
tags.description: Billing event and billing summary reads.

tags.name: operations
tags.description: Rate-limit governance and runtime operation controls.
